nasb.text: and a basket of unleavened cakes of fine flour mixed with oil and unleavened wafers spread with oil, along with their grain offering and their drink offering.

esv.text: and a basket of unleavened bread, loaves of fine flour mixed with oil, and unleavened wafers smeared with oil, and their grain offering and their drink offerings.

cnv.text: 一籃無酵調油的細麵餅和抹油的無酵薄餅，以及同獻的素祭和奠祭。

ccb.text: 一篮调油的无酵细面饼和涂油的无酵薄饼，以及素祭和奠祭。
